C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF, VICTOR LIU WHO WAS REPRESENTED BY HIS ATTORNEY OF RECORD, BRENDA CRUZ KEITH AND PROPERTY MANAGER, M. J. ROBINSON. ARNOLD EVJE II, PRO TEM. D. CARTER CLERK. PATTY DOWLING-TUCKER, REPORTER. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS RECORDED. SEE CLERK MINUTES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEWART, RONALD TIKI, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 545 O'FARRELL STREET #305, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAR-01-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, PROVIDED DEFTS. VACATE ON OR BEFORE 3/1/97 AT 5:00 P.M. AND LEAVE THE PREMISE IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION AND RETURN KEY PLAINTIFF WAIVES BACK RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES THROUGH 3/1/97. DEFTS WAIVE RECOVERY OF SECURITY DEPOSIT. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COST AND ATTY. FEES. RELEASE PER CIVIL CODE 1542.
